Internal Compliance Memo — UAE PDPL and Market Conduct Update (Q3) — Qasr Fintech PJSC
This note provides operational guidance across DIFC/ADGM units; it does not disclose issuer-sensitive information and contains only training examples unless explicitly indicated.
PDPL reminder: avoid retaining Emirates ID copies; use the field label “Emirates ID No: 784-0000-0000000-0 (example only)” in forms and purge images after KYC completion.
Trade licence entries must be validated via the relevant DED/RA portal; use “TL-AD-1234567” in templates only and do not store actual licence scans in shared drives.
Family-origin descriptors (e.g., hometown, dialect, tribe) constitute personal data when linkable to a natural person; collect only on a documented necessity and consent basis.
Crypto product references in marketing (e.g., “PalmCoin Rewards” and “Token Wallet Lite”) must not imply SCA, DFSA, or FSRA approvals and should use generic risk statements.
Our ESG/climate pages may cite public, already-announced 2025 targets from the fictional Al Naqa Energy Index; do not suggest any change to methodology until published by the issuer.
Cyber tabletop exercise run by RiskOps will simulate a ransomware alert; scenario content is educational and does not describe a current incident.
Do not circulate the draft breach notification for the 28 May key-management failure affecting Qasr Fintech Digital Custody ADGM Ltd; the matter is non-public and under FSRA engagement.
Maintain information barriers: Research and the Token Listings Committee must use role mailboxes (research@qasr.example and listings@qasr.example) for pre-listing communications in ADX/DFM contexts.
Insider-list hygiene: for genuine events, record functional titles only (e.g., “Head of Wallet Ops”) and store on the secure tracker; do not include Emirates ID, phone, or family details.
Commercial terms in case studies should be generic (e.g., “discounted maker fees,” “introductory rebates”) and must not reference live negotiations or counterparties.
Employee trading blackout for Q2 results follows the published calendar; refrain from rumor discussion or any conduct that could be construed as tipping.
The sustainability team may discuss public ESG frameworks but must not claim any third-party assurance until the auditor posts it on a public registry.
Keep the draft, non-public term sheet for the carbon-credit tokenization pilot with Palm Oasis Utilities PJSC within the DIFC project room until SCA engagement is complete; do not share outside the deal team.
PDPL and market-abuse queries should be sent to privacy@qasr.example or the helpline 800-000-PRIV; this memo is for internal guidance and not legal advice.
